title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Amazing! You're incredible! How did you pull in
such a big haul?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Why, with all of these, we could turn your office
into a veritable plushie kingdom!
choice_data_list:
I guess my workplace is about to become a lot
livelier.

I guess my workplace is about to become a lot
livelier.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, from this day forward, I am princess of the
plushie kingdom!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'll do my best with the support of all my cuddly
followers!
